description: Mercantile letter in Judaeo-Arabic. Fragment (bottom half). Dating: early to mid-12th century. Mentions ṭabarī cushions, Abū Kathīr, something 'narjisiyya,' and a silver zabdiyya (a kind of vessel). There is a postscript added by Abū l-Ḥasan b. Khulayf al-Iskandarānī, who wants the addressee to ask Abū Zikrī Yehuda al-Sijilmāsī Kohen (the well-known representative of the merchants in Fustat) if the 'khuṣrawān' has reached him with the Raʾīs.
